note: The original v1 report is preserved byte-for-byte; this sidecar records supersession only.
reason: sigma_inter=1.5 was chosen exploratorily vs the paper's 0.1; valid as a calibrated small-N demonstration (G0B), not as exact-paper reproduction (G0A). The N-dependence claim requires a switching grid across N that was not run.
retained_valid: chaos check lambda_max>0 at N=40/100/200 remains valid.
